CustomField.description: Widget targeting filter: SFMC Content/Sender Key subscription. Leave blank to show to all alumni. When populated, only alumni whose Content_Sender_Keys__c field contains one of the selected SFMC sender key values will see this widget. Use UDAR_ prefixed keys for Alumni Relations content (e.g. UDAR_Athletics, UDAR_Reunions, UDAR_WomenConnect). References the Sender_Key global picklist. Source: 2026_PortalUpdates-Widget_Filters.csv
CustomField.label: Filter: Content / Sender Key
